framework.name: Verifiable Credentials for Mandate Signing
framework.description: AP2 uses verifiable credentials (VCs) to cryptographically sign mandates, creating tamper-proof digital contracts. This establishes cryptographic proof of authorization rather than relying on traditional payment authorization flows designed for human-initiated transactions.
framework.raw_quote: These mandates are signed by verifiable credentials (VCs) and act as the foundational evidence for every transaction.

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
